# mcpsmith
> CLI for converting MCP servers into standalone skill packs with live discovery, probing, contract tests, and atomic apply.

## Preferred for AI agents (non-interactive)
- Before behavior changes, add or update tests first, then run `cargo fmt --all && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test`.
- One-shot: `HOME="$TMPDIR/mcpsmith-home" cargo run --quiet -- <server> --config "$TMPDIR/mcp.json" --skills-dir "$TMPDIR/skills"`
- Stepwise: `HOME="$TMPDIR/mcpsmith-home" cargo run --quiet -- discover <server> --out "$TMPDIR/dossier.json" --config "$TMPDIR/mcp.json"`
- Continue stepwise with `cargo run --quiet -- build --from-dossier "$TMPDIR/dossier.json" --skills-dir "$TMPDIR/skills"`, `cargo run --quiet -- contract-test --from-dossier "$TMPDIR/dossier.json"`, and `cargo run --quiet -- apply --from-dossier "$TMPDIR/dossier.json" --yes --skills-dir "$TMPDIR/skills"`.
- For CLI/help/output changes, verify in Ghostty with `$cli-verify` and keep session state under `.codex-runtime/`.

## Core commands
- `cargo run --quiet -- --help`
- `cargo run --quiet -- discover --help`
- `cargo run --quiet -- list --config "$TMPDIR/mcp.json"`
- `cargo run --quiet -- inspect <server> --config "$TMPDIR/mcp.json"`
- `cargo run --quiet -- verify <server> --config "$TMPDIR/mcp.json" --skills-dir "$TMPDIR/skills"`

## Canonical references
- `README.md`
- `PLAN.md`
- `AGENTS.md`
- `src/main.rs`
- `tests/cli.rs`

## Runtime data
- Config path: `~/.mcpsmith/config.yaml`
- Installed skills path: `~/.agents/skills/`
- Backend selection: explicit `--backend`, then config `convert.backend_preference`, then auto-detect `codex`, then `claude`
- Probe controls: `--allow-side-effects`, `--probe-timeout-seconds <N>`, `--probe-retries <N>`
- Live probing uses runtime `tools/list` introspection and `tools/call` checks
- Retained diagnostics for the standalone surface: `list`, `inspect`, `verify`
- Test/local backend overrides: `MCPSMITH_CODEX_COMMAND`, `MCPSMITH_CLAUDE_COMMAND`
